game_name: Need for Speed III: Hot Pursuit

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Tuning System
special_mechanics.description: Customizable car handling via digit-sensitive, percentage-based sliders affecting engine tuning, gear ratios, brake balance, braking speed, suspension, and aerodynamics

physics_values.engine_tuning: affects acceleration vs top speed trade-off
physics_values.brake_balance: front/rear bias affects turn width and drifting
physics_values.aerodynamics: increases top speed at cost of handling

special_mechanics.name: Police Pursuit System
special_mechanics.description: Multiple police cars can pursue racer with tactical roadblocks and spike strips; police have blocking and ambush capabilities

physics_values.roadblock_behavior: computer-controlled police form wall with gaps for avoidance
physics_values.spike_strip_behavior: deployed on one side of road only

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Racing game with no documented character/physics movement parameters. Game mechanics focus on vehicle tuning and AI pursuit systems rather than fundamental movement physics. Wikipedia source contains no numerical physics values.
